mducasble@MacBook-Pro-de-Mark kgeneyeprot % node scripts/fix-ios-build.js --patch-provider
symlink ok: node_modules/expo-kgen-advanced-capture
[ExpoKgen] Found ExpoModulesProvider.swift at: /Users/mducasble/Desktop/kgeneyeprot/ios/Pods/Target Support Files/Pods-KGeNDataCollector/ExpoModulesProvider.swift
[ExpoKgen] Current provider file content:
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
/**
 * Automatically generated by expo-modules-autolinking.
 *
 * This autogenerated class provides a list of classes of native Expo modules,
 * but only these that are written in Swift and use the new API for creating Expo modules.
 */

import ExpoModulesCore
import Expo
import ExpoAsset
import ExpoAudio
import EXAV
import ExpoBlur
import ExpoCamera
import EXConstants
import ExpoCrypto
import ExpoDevice
import ExpoFileSystem
import ExpoFont
import ExpoGlassEffect
import ExpoHaptics
import ExpoImage
import ExpoImagePicker
import ExpoKeepAwake
import ExpoLinearGradient
import ExpoLinking
import ExpoLocation
import ExpoHead
import ExpoScreenOrientation
import ExpoSecureStore
import ExpoSensors
import ExpoSplashScreen
import ExpoSymbols
import ExpoSystemUI
import ExpoVideoThumbnails
import ExpoWebBrowser

@objc(ExpoModulesProvider)
public class ExpoModulesProvider: ModulesProvider {
  public override func getModuleClasses() -> [AnyModule.Type] {
    return [
      ExpoFetchModule.self,
      AssetModule.self,
      AudioModule.self,
      VideoViewModule.self,
      BlurViewModule.self,
      CameraViewModule.self,
      ConstantsModule.self,
      CryptoModule.self,
      DeviceModule.self,
      FileSystemModule.self,
      FileSystemLegacyModule.self,
      FontLoaderModule.self,
      FontUtilsModule.self,
      GlassEffectModule.self,
      HapticsModule.self,
      ImageModule.self,
      ImagePickerModule.self,
      KeepAwakeModule.self,
      LinearGradientModule.self,
      ExpoLinkingModule.self,
      LocationModule.self,
      ExpoHeadModule.self,
      LinkPreviewNativeModule.self,
      ScreenOrientationModule.self,
      SecureStoreModule.self,
      AccelerometerModule.self,
      BarometerModule.self,
      DeviceMotionModule.self,
      GyroscopeModule.self,
      MagnetometerModule.self,
      MagnetometerUncalibratedModule.self,
      PedometerModule.self,
      SplashScreenModule.self,
      SymbolModule.self,
      ExpoSystemUIModule.self,
      VideoThumbnailsModule.self,
      WebBrowserModule.self
    ]
  }

  public override func getAppDelegateSubscribers() -> [ExpoAppDelegateSubscriber.Type] {
    return [
      FileSystemBackgroundSessionHandler.self,
      LinkingAppDelegateSubscriber.self,
      ExpoHeadAppDelegateSubscriber.self,
      ScreenOrientationAppDelegate.self,
      SplashScreenAppDelegateSubscriber.self
    ]
  }

  public override func getReactDelegateHandlers() -> [ExpoReactDelegateHandlerTupleType] {
    return [
      (packageName: "expo-screen-orientation", handler: ScreenOrientationReactDelegateHandler.self)
    ]
  }

  public override func getAppCodeSignEntitlements() -> AppCodeSignEntitlements {
    return AppCodeSignEntitlements.from(json: #"{}"#)
  }
}

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
[ExpoKgen] Matched pattern: ModuleName.self, (with comma)
[ExpoKgen] Added: import ExpoKgenAdvancedCapture
[ExpoKgen] ✅ ExpoModulesProvider.swift patched successfully
[ExpoKgen]    Path: /Users/mducasble/Desktop/kgeneyeprot/ios/Pods/Target Support Files/Pods-KGeNDataCollector/ExpoModulesProvider.swift
[ExpoKgen]    → Clean Xcode build required: ⌘⇧K then ⌘R
[ExpoKgen] Patched file content:
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
/**
 * Automatically generated by expo-modules-autolinking.
 *
 * This autogenerated class provides a list of classes of native Expo modules,
 * but only these that are written in Swift and use the new API for creating Expo modules.
 */

import ExpoModulesCore
import Expo
import ExpoAsset
import ExpoAudio
import EXAV
import ExpoBlur
import ExpoCamera
import EXConstants
import ExpoCrypto
import ExpoDevice
import ExpoFileSystem
import ExpoFont
import ExpoGlassEffect
import ExpoHaptics
import ExpoImage
import ExpoImagePicker
import ExpoKeepAwake
import ExpoLinearGradient
import ExpoLinking
import ExpoLocation
import ExpoHead
import ExpoScreenOrientation
import ExpoSecureStore
import ExpoSensors
import ExpoSplashScreen
import ExpoSymbols
import ExpoSystemUI
import ExpoVideoThumbnails
import ExpoWebBrowser

import ExpoKgenAdvancedCapture
@objc(ExpoModulesProvider)
public class ExpoModulesProvider: ModulesProvider {
  public override func getModuleClasses() -> [AnyModule.Type] {
    return [
      ExpoKgenAdvancedCaptureModule.self,
      ExpoFetchModule.self,
      AssetModule.self,
      AudioModule.self,
      VideoViewModule.self,
      BlurViewModule.self,
      CameraViewModule.self,
      ConstantsModule.self,
      CryptoModule.self,
      DeviceModule.self,
      FileSystemModule.self,
      FileSystemLegacyModule.self,
      FontLoaderModule.self,
      FontUtilsModule.self,
      GlassEffectModule.self,
      HapticsModule.self,
      ImageModule.self,
      ImagePickerModule.self,
      KeepAwakeModule.self,
      LinearGradientModule.self,
      ExpoLinkingModule.self,
      LocationModule.self,
      ExpoHeadModule.self,
      LinkPreviewNativeModule.self,
      ScreenOrientationModule.self,
      SecureStoreModule.self,
      AccelerometerModule.self,
      BarometerModule.self,
      DeviceMotionModule.self,
      GyroscopeModule.self,
      MagnetometerModule.self,
      MagnetometerUncalibratedModule.self,
      PedometerModule.self,
      SplashScreenModule.self,
      SymbolModule.self,
      ExpoSystemUIModule.self,
      VideoThumbnailsModule.self,
      WebBrowserModule.self
    ]
  }

  public override func getAppDelegateSubscribers() -> [ExpoAppDelegateSubscriber.Type] {
    return [
      FileSystemBackgroundSessionHandler.self,
      LinkingAppDelegateSubscriber.self,
      ExpoHeadAppDelegateSubscriber.self,
      ScreenOrientationAppDelegate.self,
      SplashScreenAppDelegateSubscriber.self
    ]
  }

  public override func getReactDelegateHandlers() -> [ExpoReactDelegateHandlerTupleType] {
    return [
      (packageName: "expo-screen-orientation", handler: ScreenOrientationReactDelegateHandler.self)
    ]
  }

  public override func getAppCodeSignEntitlements() -> AppCodeSignEntitlements {
    return AppCodeSignEntitlements.from(json: #"{}"#)
  }
}

──────────────────────────────
